findings.evidence: `rg -n "instSemilatticeSup|Main declarations" TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Subcoalgebra/Lattice.lean` shows the main-declaration bullet at line 21 and the undocumented instance at line 105.
findings.fix: Add a docstring before the instance, e.g. explaining that subcoalgebras form a semilattice under the join whose carrier is the submodule supremum.
findings.issue: `Subcoalgebra.instSemilatticeSup` is an exported main declaration with no docstring, despite being listed in the module docstring as part of the file's main API.

summary: The new file has a useful module docstring and most public API is documented, but one exported main instance lacks a declaration docstring.
